scene_context.description: Ray waits alone in the motel room, pacing, watching the parking lot through the gap in the curtains.

director_vision.era_style: Early 2000s American Southwest — gritty, sun-bleached, analog
director_vision.color_palette_mood: Sodium-orange exterior neon vs. cold blue-green fluorescent interior
director_vision.light_vision: Hard practicals, deep shadows, neon bleed

location_bible.space_description: Low-ceilinged motel room with dated carpet and stained walls
location_bible.atmosphere: Claustrophobic and transient — nowhere feels like home
location_bible.light_base_state: Single bedside lamp, neon sign bleed through curtains
key_details: parking lot visible through gap in curtains
